kwargs.content:
I need you to process the meter readings for tour J09C. Take all entries from the decision_table where the TOUR starts with "J09C" and put them into a temporary table called J09C_temp. Then add a new column called ENTSCHEIDUNG to that table.

For classifying each house: count how many equipment numbers (EQUNR) belong to each house (HAUS). If a house has fewer than 3 equipment numbers, set its ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA". Otherwise, set it to "EVU". There are four additional overrides that always result in "EVU": houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is 0, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 500 and 599, houses where HOUSE_NUM1 is between 900 and 999, and houses located in the areas of Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.

Next, enrich the data by joining it with the EABLG table using the INSTALLATION field, and also pull in customer contact details from both the net_master and sales_master tables using the EQUNR field. When both net and sales data exist for a customer, prefer the sales data and leave the net data fields empty. If only net data exists, keep that.

There is one more classification to handle: check the EABL table for equipment numbers that had "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" as ISTABLART_TXT in both 2023 and 2024 (based on Record created on). For those, set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING".

Export the MANDATORY_READING entries separately as a CSV file named "J09C_MANDATORY_READING" with these columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`. Send that file to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.

Then export all remaining entries (everything except MANDATORY_READING) as a CSV file named "J09C" with the same columns. Send that to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com. After that, delete the temporary table.

args.sqlite_command: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS J09C_temp; CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT d.*, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, NULL AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", NULL AS TITLE, NULL AS FORENAME, NULL AS SURNAME, NULL AS STREET, NULL AS STREETNO, NULL AS EMAIL FROM decision_table d WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%';

content.text: {"success":false,"error":"You can only execute one statement at a time.","message":"SQL execution failed"}

structured_content.error: You can only execute one statement at a time.

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09C_temp AS SELECT d.*, NULL AS ENTSCHEIDUNG, NULL AS "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", NULL AS TITLE, NULL AS FORENAME, NULL AS SURNAME, NULL AS STREET, NULL AS STREETNO, NULL AS EMAIL FROM decision_table d WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09C%'

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 = 0 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599 THEN 'EVU' WHEN HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999 THEN 'EVU' WHEN CITY1 LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR CITY2 LIKE '%Wiblingwerde%' OR CITY1 LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' OR CITY2 LIKE '%Breckerfeld%' THEN 'EVU' WHEN HAUS IN (SELECT HAUS FROM J09C_temp GROUP BY HAUS HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) < 3) THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END
UPDATE J09C_temp SET "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." = (SELECT eg."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No." FROM eablg eg WHERE eg.Installation = J09C_temp.ANLAGE LIMIT 1)

UPDATE J09C_temp SET TITLE = (SELECT sm.TITLE FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), FORENAME = (SELECT sm.FORENAME FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), SURNAME = (SELECT sm.SURNAME FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREET = (SELECT sm.STREET FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), STREETNO = (SELECT sm.STREETNO FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT sm.POST_CODE1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT sm.CITY1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT sm.CITY2 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2), EMAIL = (SELECT sm.EMAIL FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1) WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR)

UPDATE J09C_temp SET TITLE = COALESCE(TITLE, (SELECT nm.TITLE FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), FORENAME = COALESCE(FORENAME, (SELECT nm.FORENAME FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), SURNAME = COALESCE(SURNAME, (SELECT nm.SURNAME FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREET = COALESCE(STREET, (SELECT nm.STREET FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), STREETNO = COALESCE(STREETNO, (SELECT nm.STREETNO FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)), POST_CODE1 = COALESCE((SELECT nm.POST_CODE1 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), POST_CODE1), CITY1 = COALESCE((SELECT nm.CITY1 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY1), CITY2 = COALESCE((SELECT nm.CITY2 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1), CITY2), EMAIL = COALESCE(EMAIL, (SELECT nm.EMAIL FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR LIMIT 1)) WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sales_master sm WHERE sm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM net_master nm WHERE nm.EQUNR = J09C_temp.EQUNR)

UPDATE J09C_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2023' GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 INTERSECT SELECT EQUNR FROM eabl WHERE ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr("Record created on",1,4) = '2024' GROUP BY EQUNR HAVING COUNT(*) > 0)

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING'

SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1, CITY1, CITY2, EMAIL FROM J09C_temp WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING' OR ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL

args.email: Please find attached the J09C mandatory reading file containing all MANDATORY_READING entries.
Please find attached the J09C meter readings file containing all non-mandatory entries.
